name: display_precision_by_currency
description: Asserts display_precision_by_currency is derived from dcontext (inferred from transaction amounts). USD at 2dp and JPY at 0dp exercise different precisions. Key list derived from dcontext.build().fmtstrings (fava 1.30.12 / beancount v3).
source:
2024-01-01 open Assets:Checking USD
2024-01-01 open Assets:JPY JPY
2024-01-01 open Equity:Opening

2024-01-02 * "USD deposit"
  Assets:Checking    1234.56 USD
  Equity:Opening    -1234.56 USD

2024-01-02 * "JPY deposit"
  Assets:JPY         160000 JPY
  Equity:Opening    -160000 JPY

known_divergences.beancount-parser: Parser-only adapter; no loader, dcontext is uninitialised.
known_divergences.beancount-parser-lima: Parser-only adapter; no loader, dcontext is uninitialised.
known_divergences.limabean: beancount-parser-lima is parse-only; dcontext is not computed, so display_precision_by_currency is absent from options.
known_divergences.rustledger: rustledger-loader's DisplayContext has no public iterator over inferred precisions; display_precision_by_currency is absent from options.
